actors.name: End User
actors.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.
capabilities: Bridge NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain
Bridge fungible tokens (e.g., $BERA, $HONEY) between Berachain and other chains
Use BeraHub to manage assets and participate in governance

actors.name: Validator
actors.description: Operates a node, participates in consensus, and engages in Proof-of-Liquidity.
capabilities: Receive base $BGT emissions for block production
Direct $BGT emissions to selected Reward Vaults
Receive protocol-provided Incentives from Reward Vaults
Set and update commission rate for incentives

actors.name: $BGT Holder/Delegator
actors.description: Holds $BGT tokens and participates in governance and PoL delegation.
capabilities: Delegate $BGT to validators to boost their rewards
Earn a share of validator's incentives and dApp fees

actors.name: Liquidity Provider
actors.description: Provides liquidity to dApps like BEX or other protocols.
capabilities: Deposit assets into liquidity pools or other protocols
Receive Receipt Tokens (e.g., LP tokens, interest-bearing tokens) representing their share/position
Stake Receipt Tokens in Reward Vaults

actors.name: Protocol/Project Representative
actors.description: Represents a dApp or project building on Berachain, seeking to integrate with PoL.
capabilities: Create Reward Vaults for their dApp
Submit Reward Vaults for whitelisting via governance
Offer Incentive Tokens in their Reward Vaults to attract $BGT emissions
Manage incentive rates and supply (if also Incentive Token Manager)

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: Elected group of signers responsible for safeguarding the governance process.
capabilities: Cancel malicious proposals during the timelock period via multisig
Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) submissions

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Manages the offering of specific incentive tokens for a Reward Vault.
capabilities: Add whitelisted Incentive Tokens to a Reward Vault
Define the amount and distribution rate (per $BGT) for incentives

actors.name: Berachain Foundation
capabilities: Manage a portion of $BERA token supply for ecosystem growth

actors.name: Big Bera Labs
actors.description: Core contributors to the Berachain blockchain, including advisors and members.

assets.name: $BERA Token
assets.description: Native gas and staking token of Berachain.

assets.name: $BGT Token
assets.description: Non-transferrable governance and Proof-of-Liquidity reward token.

assets.name: $HONEY Token
assets.description: Native, fully collateralized stablecoin of Berachain, soft-pegged to USD.

assets.name: Berachain NFT
assets.description: Official NFT collections with utility such as airdrop eligibility.

assets.name: LP Token
assets.description: Receipt token representing a share in a liquidity pool, a specific type of Receipt Token.

assets.name: Incentive Token
assets.description: Whitelisted tokens (e.g., $USDC, protocol native tokens) offered as rewards in the PoL system.

assets.name: Private Key
assets.description: Cryptographic key granting access to a user's wallet and assets.

assets.name: Governance Proposal
assets.description: A formal proposal for changes or decisions within the Berachain ecosystem, voted on by $BGT holders.

assets.name: Receipt Token
assets.description: General token representing a user's contribution or position in a protocol, such as LP tokens or interest-bearing tokens, stakeable in Reward Vaults.

assets.name: Wallet Phrase
assets.description: Mnemonic phrase (recovery phrase) used to backup and restore a user's wallet and access to private keys.

components.name: User Wallet
components.description: Client-side software (e.g., MetaMask) for managing keys and interacting with Berachain.

components.name: Berachain Core L1
components.description: The Layer 1 blockchain platform, encompassing EVM, consensus (utilizing BeaconKit/CometBFT), and Proof-of-Liquidity logic.

components.name: Governance System
components.description: Smart contracts managing the lifecycle of governance proposals, voting, and execution, including timelock.

components.name: BeraHub
components.description: A web dApp platform for users to interact with various Berachain features like PoL, BEX, governance, and rewards.

components.name: Berachain BEX
components.description: Native decentralized exchange (DEX) on Berachain for swapping tokens and providing liquidity.

components.name: Reward Vault Contract
components.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets (Receipt Tokens like LP tokens) to earn $BGT rewards. Holds offered Incentive Tokens.

components.name: Honey Minting System
components.description: System for minting and redeeming $HONEY, including HoneySwap dApp, HoneyFactory, and collateral-specific vaults.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor Contract
components.description: Smart contract responsible for distributing protocol-provided incentives to validators and their $BGT delegators.

components.name: Validator Node Infrastructure
components.description: Hardware and software run by validators to participate in network consensus and block production.

components.name: Berachain NFT Bridge
components.description: Service and smart contracts enabling the transfer of official Berachain NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain.

components.name: Ethereum Blockchain
components.description: External Layer 1 blockchain where official Berachain NFTs may originate.

components.name: Guardian Multisig
components.description: A multisignature contract controlled by Guardians to cancel malicious governance proposals.

components.name: Airdrop Service
components.description: Web services and smart contracts for checking eligibility and claiming $BERA airdrops.

components.name: Berachain Token Bridge
components.description: Service and smart contracts, powered by LayerZero, for transferring fungible tokens between Berachain and other blockchains.

components.name: Distributor Contract
components.description: Smart contract responsible for emitting $BGT to whitelisted Reward Vaults on a per-block basis, based on validator allocations.

components.name: FeeCollector Contract
components.description: Smart contract that collects fees from Berachain core dApps (e.g., BEX, HoneySwap) and distributes them (as $WBERA) to $BGT holders who have boosted validators.

components.name: BeaconKit
components.description: Modular and customizable consensus layer framework leveraging CometBFT, used by Berachain for its consensus mechanism.

data_flows.data: User interactions (e.g. swap requests, liquidity provision, governance votes, claims)
data_flows.description: User interacts with BeraHub to perform various actions.
BeraHub routes user requests to BEX contracts.
Validators configure their $BGT emission allocations, and the Distributor Contract emits $BGT to Reward Vaults accordingly.
Users claim earned $BGT from Reward Vaults via their wallet (often through BeraHub).
User submits or votes on a governance proposal.
Guardian Multisig cancels a malicious proposal in the Governance System.

data_flows.data: Collateral deposit for $HONEY minting / $HONEY for redemption
data_flows.description: User interacts with Honey Minting System to mint or redeem $HONEY.
Reward Vaults, holding protocol-provided incentives, send captured incentives (net of validator commission) to the BGTIncentiveDistributor for distribution to boosters.
NFTs are bridged from Ethereum to Berachain via the NFT Bridge.
NFTs arrive on Berachain Core L1 after bridging.

trust_boundaries.name: Wallet-Blockchain Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's wallet from the Berachain L1. Transactions are signed by the wallet and validated by the blockchain.

trust_boundaries.name: dApp-SmartContract Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the BeraHub frontend (or other dApp frontends) from the backend smart contracts (e.g., BEX, Reward Vaults, Honey System, Distributor, FeeCollector). Frontend could be a point of attack.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain-Ethereum Bridge Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Berachain L1 and Ethereum L1, with the NFT Bridge and Token Bridge facilitating cross-chain transfers. Trust in bridge security is essential.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Oversight Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Guardians (via Guardian Multisig) oversee proposals within the Governance System, providing a check against malicious proposals.

behaviors.name: User Stakes Receipt Tokens
behaviors.description: Liquidity Provider stakes Receipt Tokens (e.g., LP tokens) into a Reward Vault to earn $BGT.

behaviors.name: Validator Directs Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator configures their $BGT emission allocation preferences, which the Distributor Contract uses to direct emissions to Reward Vaults.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Votes on Proposal
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder casts a vote on an active governance proposal.

behaviors.name: Guardian Cancels Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardian initiates action through the Guardian Multisig to cancel a malicious governance proposal.

behaviors.name: User Mints $HONEY
behaviors.description: End User deposits whitelisted collateral into the Honey Minting System to mint $HONEY.

behaviors.name: Protocol Offers Incentives
behaviors.description: Incentive Token Manager adds Incentive Tokens to their managed Reward Vault.

behaviors.name: User Claims Airdrop
behaviors.description: End User interacts with the Airdrop Service to claim their $BERA tokens.

behaviors.name: User Bridges NFT
behaviors.description: End User uses the Berachain NFT Bridge to transfer an NFT from Ethereum to Berachain.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Redeems $BGT for $BERA
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder burns $BGT to receive an equivalent amount of $BERA via a core L1 function.

behaviors.name: Validator Proposes Block
behaviors.description: A validator selected by the consensus mechanism proposes a new block to the Berachain Core L1.

behaviors.name: User Delegates $BGT to Validator
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder delegates their $BGT to a Validator to boost the validator's potential rewards and earn a share of incentives.

behaviors.name: Validator Stakes $BERA
behaviors.description: A prospective or active Validator stakes $BERA in the Berachain Core L1 to participate in consensus and secure the network.
